rulings.Case Title: BRIAN ROBERTS et al VS. ALFA LAVAL INC SUED INDIVIDUALLLY AND AS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.S Motion To Dismiss Or Stay For Forum Non Conveniens, Or In The Alternative, Motion To Apply Texas Law
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 7, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.¿s motion to dismiss or stay for forum non conveniens is denied. At this late stage of the case, the balance of the relevant considerations ¿ including all the work that has been done by the parties in reliance on this case being tried in San Francisco and avoidance of additional costs and delay associated with the filing and prosecution of a new case in Texas ¿ weigh strongly in favor of retaining the case in this forum. Defendant¿s alternative motion to apply Texas law is granted. A true and material conflict exists between California and Texas law, and the interest of Texas will be more impaired if its law is not applied. = (220/HEK)
